text: In this dimly lit space, accented by blue and neon hues, I feel a sense of surreal detachment. The cool glow beyond the glass suggests a boundary, a threshold to a place of contemplation or innovation. The wall marked 'R+D' hints at experimentation and the pursuit of new ideas, adding an air of curiosity and anticipation. I am both observer and participant, hovering at the edge of discovery, quietly wondering what will emerge from this union of shadow and light.
